sso.summary: SAML 2.0 SSO on Business+ and Enterprise Grid; OIDC via supported IdPs. SSO is gated to paid/enterprise tiers ('SSO tax').

citations.title: Manage members with SCIM provisioning — Slack

ulm.summary: SCIM 1.1/2.0 API provisions, updates, and deactivates members org-wide on Enterprise Grid (single org-level token). Users are deactivated (not deleted) and immediately signed out of all devices.

citations.title: Using the Slack SCIM API — Slack Developer Docs
SCIM API reference — Slack Developer Docs

entitlements.summary: SCIM Groups push and membership sync are available org-wide on Enterprise Grid; fine-grained in-product entitlements beyond group/workspace membership are limited.

citations.title: SCIM API reference (Groups) — Slack Developer Docs

riskSignals.summary: No public CAEP / Shared Signals Framework transmitter or receiver documented as of 2026-06.

logout.summary: Admin/SCIM deactivation immediately signs a member out of all devices, and admins can force sign-out; standard SAML Single Logout (SLO) is limited.

citations.title: Using the Slack SCIM API — Slack Developer Docs

tokenRevocation.summary: OAuth token revocation via auth.revoke; admins can revoke app tokens and member sessions from the org admin console.
